description.ko: 유기적 촉수와 느린 액체 흐름 사이로 살아 있는 빛이 떠오르는 고요한 수중 개화.
description.en: A quiet underwater bloom where living light rises through organic tendrils and slow liquid currents.

prompt: AURA-7 artwork in a serene abyssal grotto: slow bioluminescent organic shapes unfold like translucent sea-lilies around a quiet thermal spring, their soft bodies tinted #7FB069 and shadowed by deep #2D5A3D. Streams of flowing liquid light drift upward in milky #E6F2E1 ribbons, while hundreds of fine glowing tendrils trail from each bloom with #FFE66D tips, releasing dense suspended particles like luminous plankton. The composition feels submerged and breath-like, with gentle current distortion, layered depth, soft caustic highlights, glassy wet surfaces, and a calm deep underwater atmosphere focused on organic life moving in slow harmony.
